task: Find the weather for Vancouver, British Columbia for the next seven days.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to The Weather Network, opened the Vancouver, BC 7 Days forecast page (URL: https://www.theweathernetwork.com/en/city/ca/british-columbia/vancouver/7-days), and the page snapshot showed daily forecast details. The final summary matches the visible forecast for the next seven days from Wed May 13 through Tue May 19, including conditions and highs/lows: Wed 17/10, Thu 15/9, Fri 11/8, Sat 14/9, Sun 15/9, Mon 16/10, Tue 17/10. This satisfies the task to find the weather for Vancouver, British Columbia for the next seven days.
